title: geranium robertianum var. modestum
intro: Geranium robertianum var. modestum, also known as the small-flowered cranesbill, is a perennial plant that belongs to the geranium family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to relieve symptoms of diarrhea, constipation, and ulcers, and also has astringent properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and promote wound healing.
